name: schoolbustrackerapp
description: SchoolBusTrackerApp is a Windows application designed to improve school transportation safety and reliability. With real-time GPS tracking, parents and administrators can monitor bus locations, reducing wait times and enhancing punctuality. ## Team Members - Sai Pooja Reddy Palle - Sushma Vadlamudi - Sai Swetha Bodlapati - Sai Shivani Yashaswini
